title: Design Token Implementation
description: How design tokens store design decisions
explanation: Design tokens are semantic variables that store design decisions, making them easily reusable and modifiable across the design system.

title: Responsive Grid Calculation
explanation: Uses 8-point grid system for consistent spacing. Values scale proportionally using multiples of 8.

title: Accessibility Color Contrast Check
description: Algorithm to check WCAG color contrast ratio
code:
// WCAG Color Contrast Checker
BEGIN
 FUNCTION GetRelativeLuminance(color)
 // Convert hex to RGB and calculate relative luminance
 r = color.red / 255
 g = color.green / 255
 b = color.blue / 255
 
 r = IF r <= 0.03928 THEN r/12.92 ELSE ((r+0.055)/1.055)^2.4
 g = IF g <= 0.03928 THEN g/12.92 ELSE ((g+0.055)/1.055)^2.4
 b = IF b <= 0.03928 THEN b/12.92 ELSE ((b+0.055)/1.055)^2.4
 
 RETURN 0.2126*r + 0.7152*g + 0.0722*b
 END FUNCTION
 
 FUNCTION CheckContrastRatio(color1, color2)
 l1 = GetRelativeLuminance(color1)
 l2 = GetRelativeLuminance(color2)
 
 lighter = MAX(l1, l2)
 darker = MIN(l1, l2)
 
 ratio = (lighter + 0.05) / (darker + 0.05)
 RETURN ratio
 END FUNCTION
 
 // WCAG AA requires 4.5:1 for normal text
 FUNCTION MeetsWCAG_AA(ratio, isLargeText)
 IF isLargeText THEN
 RETURN ratio >= 3.0
 ELSE
 RETURN ratio >= 4.5
 END IF
 END FUNCTION
END
explanation: Calculates color contrast ratio using WCAG formula. AA compliance requires 4.5:1 for normal text and 3:1 for large text.
